title: OrigamiKings Enhancement Mod
description: A mod based on enhancing Minecraft. Adds a woodcutter and Vertical slabs
body:
# I am kinda done with modding so this mod is archived. I may get back to it one day. # OrigamiKings Enhancement mod This is a small mod based on enhancing Minecraft **As of 0.6.0 and greater this mod will now require my [API Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/origamikings-api)** ## Please report and bugs or ideas to my [GitHub](https://github.com/OrigamiKing3612/OrigamiKings-Enhancement-Mod) Some things this mod adds are: 1. Concrete stairs and slabs 2. Gold and Copper bars 3. Variants of barrels, bookshelves, and ladders 4. Glass Stairs and Slabs 5. Leaf stairs and slabs and walls 6. Woodcutter **See [The wiki](http://wiki.origamiking.net/oem/OEM.html) for more information about the mod** For anyone wondering, yes you may use this mod in a Modpack just please give credit.
Click me to see the inventory

# Some in-game pictures (**Outdated**)
